channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Pelicans fire basketball operations chief David Griffin after an injury-plagued 21-61 season
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — The New Orleans Pelicans fired basketball operations chief David Griffin on Monday, ending a six-year chapter during which the club drafted former Duke superstar Zion Williamson but still struggled to win consistently with three different coaches.
item.dc:creator: BRETT MARTEL, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: The Nico Iamaleava ripple, the portal opens and positional needs along the West Coast: Welcome to the spring transfer window
item.description: UCLA, Washington, Utah and Arizona State are among the teams with lingering needs as the spring transfer portal opens.
item.dc:creator: Jon Wilner, The Mercury News

item.title: Trump receives praise from WWE icon for ability to generate heat
item.description: WWE chief content officer Paul Levesque praised President Donald Trump's ability to generate heat and get "under people's skin" amid his rise to the White House.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Yankees' Aaron Judge to be US captain at 2026 World Baseball Classic
item.description: Aaron Judge will be the U.S. captain at next year’s World Baseball Classic, the same role the two-time American League Most Valuable Player fills with the New York Yankees.
item.dc:creator: Ronald Blum, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: WWE boss pulls back curtain on John Cena heel turn ahead of WrestleMania 41
item.description: WWE's Chief Content Officer Paul Levesque opened about the behind-the-scenes talks with John Cena about turning him heel in a podcast interview.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Miami's Mario Cristobal delivers stern message to players thinking of NIL holdouts
item.description: Miami Hurricanes football coach Mario Cristobal sent a warning to players who were thinking of trying to pull an NIL holdout similar to what was seen in Tennessee.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Rory McIlroy wins Masters playoff to complete the career Grand Slam
item.description: AUGUSTA, Ga. (AP) — The closer Rory McIlroy came to fulfilling his lifetime dream — winning the Masters — the more it kept slipping away. Sunday at Augusta National felt like his last 11 years in the majors, blunders mixed in with sheer brilliance. A two-shot lead gone in two holes.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: How Trump administration’s transgender athlete order affects California high schools
item.description: The CIF is under federal Title IX investigation for policies on transgender athlete participation in sports, says it is abiding by California law.
item.dc:creator: Evan Webeck, The Mercury News

item.title: Rory McIlroy beats Justin Rose in Masters playoff to win green jacket, complete Grand Slam
item.description: Rory McIlroy has beaten Justin Rose in a playoff hole to win the 89th edition of The Masters at Augusta National Golf Club on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Warriors' playoff seeding set after loss against Clippers in regular-season finale
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- The Golden State Warriors' playoff path is set. They will play in the NBA Play-In Tournament following a home overtime loss to the Los Angeles Clippers in Sunday's regular-season finale. With the loss, the Warriors will face the Memphis Grizzlies on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Cubs have big night in 16-0 rout of Dodgers, handing LA the worst home shutout loss in franchise history
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The Los Angeles Dodgers franchise has been around since 1884, going back to its days in Brooklyn. And no team had ever done to the Dodgers in front of their home crowd what the Cubs did at Dodger Stadium on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: MIKE DIGIOVANNA, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Kansas man who was falsely accused of being a shooter after Chiefs’ 2024 Super Bowl win has died
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — A Kansas man who was falsely accused of being among the shooters who opened fire at a rally celebrating the Kansas City Chiefs’ Super Bowl victory last year has died, his attorney said. Denton Loudermill Jr.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Blackhawks host the Jets following Foligno's 2-goal game
item.description: Winnipeg Jets (54-21-4, in the Central Division) vs. Chicago Blackhawks (23-46-10, in the Central Division) Chicago; Saturday, 7 p.m. EDT BOTTOM LINE: The Chicago Blackhawks host the Winnipeg Jets after Nick Foligno's two-goal game against the Boston Bruins in the Blackhawks' 5-2 win.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Tampa Bay Rowdies dismiss head coach ahead of home opener
item.description: A spokesperson for the Tampa Bay Rowdies announced Friday that the club has relieved head coach Robbie Neilson of his duties.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Tucker, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Bulls beat Heat behind Giddey's triple-double, move ahead of Miami for play-in home game
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — The Bulls have just one game left at the United Center on their regular-season schedule. But they took a big step toward securing at least one more home game for the Eastern Conference play-in tournament.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Like father, like son: Shoei Darvish steps on the hill for Dons
item.description: With a flurry of pitches, Shoei Darvish showed the skills that we've already seen in Petco Park from his father. But make no mistake, this junior righty is doing it on his terms - but with some talented influence.
item.dc:creator: Allison Edmonds, Fox 5

item.title: Babe Ruth's former Florida home goes up for sale for nearly $2M
item.description: The 1924 craftsman bungalow, located in St. Petersburg's Historic Old Northeast neighborhood, once belonged to Ruth, according to the real estate listing.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Tucker, NewsNation

item.title: Fans impressed with new Bees Ballpark
item.description: SOUTH JORDAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Welcome to The Ballpark. The state of Utah has not had a brand new stadium since 2008 when Real Salt Lake opened Rio Tinto Stadium.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: 49ers star’s high school retired his jersey
item.description: (KRON) – For the first time, a Colorado high school has retired a jersey for one of its former students. That alum was none other than San Francisco 49ers star Christian McCaffrey. Valor Christian High School recently retired McCaffrey’s No.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Baker, KRON4

item.title: Walter Clayton Jr.'s defensive stop gives Florida its 3rd national title with 65-63 win over Houston
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — Florida’s Walter Clayton Jr. came up with the perfect going-away present for that spirit-crushing Houston defense that bullied, battered and bedeviled him all night. It was a defensive gem of his own. Right before the buzzer. For the win and the national title.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, NewsNation
